title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP -IN YOUNG LAI ASSOCIATION (YLA) IN ELECTRIC VENG BRANCH HAWNG
content:
206/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Lawngtlai bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan 'YLA In' Electric Veng Branch a hawng.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan YLA leh vengchhung mipuiten a tulna ang anga tangkai taka an hman tura lawm taka 'YLA In' a hawn thu a sawi a. YLA hruaituten tha leh zung, ngaithuthna seng a theihtawp an chhuahna bakah Bialtu MLA, leh mitlawmngaite inphalna zarah 'YLA In' tha tak an nei thei chu a lawmpui thu a sawi a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawnga Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga vengte inelna pawimawh tak 'Bawrhsap Awward' ah Pakhat na dinhmun Electric Veng ten an hauh chu thinlung taka a lawmpui thu tarlangin, hmalam hunah pawh theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah a.Drug Free District - kalpui mek a nih thu sawiin, bawrhsap chuan Ruihhlo do kawngah YLA leh khawtlang mipuite theihtawp chhuahpui turin a sawm a. Ruihhlo laka fihlim leh Ruihhlo awm lohna veng a inchhal ngam ni thei tura Ruihhlo do kawnga tan la thar sauh sauh turin a fuih a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan bialtu MLA in 'Tho law dir tuah (Stand up Lawngtlai)' a hawn thu tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak taka hmalak tan mek zel a ni, a ti a. Faina leh thianghlimna, khawpui cheimawi, Traffic Management, leh Ruihhlo do kawngah District Administration leh LADC - te an thawkho mek tih sawiin, hemi kawngah hian sawrkar anga hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrangah VC, YLA leh mipuite thawhpuina a pawimawh dawn hle tiin, thawhpuiah a sawm a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna tur kawng hrang hrang kelpui mek a nih thu tarlangin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kawng engkima sawrkar lo tawiawm zel turin kalkawmte leh veng mipuite a sawm nghal a ni.

Pu F. Lalrothanga, President, CYLA, chuan YLA Electric Veng Branch ten 'YLA In' tha tak an nei chu thinlung taka a lawmpui thu sawiin, tangkai taka hmang turin a chah a. Tlawmngai Pawl an nihna hriaa, vengchhung mipuite tana thahnem ngai taka thawk zel turin a ngen a ni. Pu K. Laldinmawia, VCP, leh Pu Joseph Lalhmingthanga Chinzah, Sr. Vice President, LDFA - te pawhin thu tawi sawina neiin, YLA bakah vengchhung mipuiten an chhawr dawn hle tiin, tangkai tak hman a ni dawn a, a enkawl kawngah pawh YLA te theihtawp chhuah zel turin an chah a ni.

Vawiin hun hmanna hi Pu Lalthangpuia, President, YLA Electric Veng Branch chuan hun a kaihruaiin, Pu Biakhmingthanga Pautu, Secretary YLA Electric Veng Branch chuan report tawi pekna a nei a, chawhlui kilho nghal a ni.

title: KOLASIB DC IN NATIONAL HIGHWAY DINHMUN LEH 4-LANE LAIH MEK A ENFIAH
content:
205/2026-2027

Kolasib, 18th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Kolasib District chhunga National Highway (NH-306 & NH-06) kawngpui hman lai mek dinhmun leh 4-Lane kawngpui siam mek te chu a hmunah tlawhin a enfiah a. He hunah hian NHIDCL hotute chuan DC hi tawiawmin, kawng siam hna an thawh dan kalphung leh hmasawn dan chanchin te uluk takin an lo hrilhfiah.

NHIDCL hotuten report an pek danin, kawngpui hman lai mek (Vairengte leh Sairang inkar) thawmthat hna hi hlawm 5-ah then a ni a. Hlawm thum (3) te chu siam zawh tawh niin, hlawm hnih (2) ah black topping thawh hmabak a la awm a ni. Kawng an siam zawh tawh chin te hi 4-lane laitu EPC Contractor te hnenah hlan tawh a ni.

Kolasib District chhunga 4-lane laih mek pawh hmun hrang hrangah tlawh nghal a ni a. NHIDCL hotute tarlan danin 4-lane kawngpui siam tur hi a vaia belhkhawmin km 90-a thui a ni a; km 30 chu kawng awmsa (existing road) ah siam a ni dawn a, km 60 chu kawng laih thar (bypass) a ni thung ang. Bypass hi hmun 6-ah a awm dawn a ni. Tuna kawngpui hman lai mek hi km 117 a ni a, he 4-lane kawngpui hi siam zawh a nih hunah chuan kawng thui zawng hi km 30 zetin a pawt tawi dawn a ni. Package 7 bik hi hna 20% zawhfel a nih tawh thu an sawi bawk.

He kawngpui thar laih mekah hian lei (bridge) engemawzah dawh a ni dawn a. Lei dawh tur zingah hian a sei na lai ber tur chu Mualkhang ram hnaiah awmin, metre 540 zeta thui tur a ni a, hei hi peihfel a nih hunah chuan Mizorama lei sei ber a ni dawn a ni.

Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan kawng siam hnaa hmasawnna hmuh tur a awm chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, hnathawktute chu theihtawp chhuaha thawk chhunzawm zel turin a chah a . Kawng siam hna an thawhnaa harsatna an neih te sutkian a nih theih nan District Administration chuan theih anga hma a lakpui zel tur thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiina DC tawiawm tute ah hian NHIDCL hotute bakah Pi B Malsawmtluangi, ADC Kolasib, Kawnpui SDO, DIPRO leh SDC Kolasib te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH POSHAN PAKHWADA PUALIN HUN HMANG
content:
204/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 18th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan India ram puma nu leh naute tana chaw tha ei pawimawhzia inhrilhhriatna, Poshan Pakhwada kalpui mek pualin Khawzawl ICDS Project chuan Electric veng YMA Hall-ah nausen thla 6 atanga kumkhat inkar inbawhvahsiakna leh ECCE Festival an hmang.

Vawiin hun hi Khawzawl CDPO Pi Esther Laltlinpuii chuan a kaihruai a. He hunah hian Poshan Pakhwada hman mek chungchang leh a pawimawhnate a sawi bakah ECCE pawimawhna sawiin Anganwadi-ah naupangte chu School kal turin zirtir a, kaihhruai thin an ni a, naupangte Anganwadi nuam an tih theihna tura naupangte kaihhruai a, enkawl thiam an pawimawh tih a sawi.

He hunah hian naupang inbawhvahsiakna (Crawling) neih niin a hmasa pathum hnenah lawmman pek an ni a. Hei bakah hian ECCE Festival-ah Anganwadi Centre 28 atangin Workers ten naupangte zirtirna tura an thil siam hrang hrangte an entir a, a thi tha zual 3 hnenah lawmman siamsak an ni bawk.

title: CEM, LADC AND DEPUTY COMMISSIONER LAWNGTLAI VISIT HRUITEZAWL
content:
28/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th April 2026:Yesterday, the Chief Executive Member (CEM) of Lai Autonomous District Council, Pu C. Lalsawmzuala, along with the Deputy Commissioner of Lawngtlai, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, visited Hruitezawl village, where they were warmly received by the local leaders.

Shri C. Lalsawmzuala expressed his gratitude for the warm reception. He stated that the Council Government aims to regulate and properly manage the movement of goods and transportation along the Chhimtuipui river routes. Highlighting the importance of smooth and well-coordinated trade with neighboring Myanmar, he emphasized the need for systematic planning and better arrangements.

He further pointed out that since Hruitezawl is located near the international border, there is a strong need for vigilance in various aspects. He encouraged the villagers to work diligently for the welfare of the land and the people. Stressing the importance of cooperation between the local leaders and the government, he assured that efforts would be made to address their needs.

Deputy Commissioner Shri Donny Lalruatsanga noted that as Hruitezawl serves as a point of cross-border trade with Myanmar, there is a high risk of illegal entry from across the border. He urged the local leaders to remain alert. He also mentioned that around 300 refugee households are currently residing in Hruitezawl under the government’s knowledge and are being monitored. He stressed the importance of ensuring that no illegal activities take place in their daily lives and called upon the community leaders to extend full cooperation. He also assured continued support from the administration in addressing the needs of the village.

During their visit, Shri C. Lalsawmzuala and Shri Donny Lalruatsanga also visited the popular tourist spot “Bawinu” located in Hruitezawl. They remarked that this scenic site, shared by Lawngtlai and Siaha districts, is a valuable asset for both districts. They emphasized the need to preserve its natural beauty while improving accessibility, visitor facilities, and infrastructure for tourism development.

The officials were accompanied by Shri  David Lalrinawma, Additional Deputy Commissioner; Shri David J. Byhnadaolai, Additional Superintendent of Police; Shri  HC. Vanlalruatpuia, Transport Officer, LADC; Shri  C. Lawmsangzuala, I&PRO, LADC, along with leaders of the MJA Lawngtlai District.

Attachment

title: FINAL RANDOMIZATION OF POLLING PERSONNEL for GENERAL ELECTION to AMC, 2026
content:
203/2026-2027Aizawl; 18th April,2026:Vawiinah khan Aizawl DC Meeting Hall-ah, AMC, 2026 General Election neih tura General observer Pu Lalnunhlua, Additional Sectretary, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. leh recognized political party 4: INC,BJP,MNF leh ZPM aiawh te telpuiin Final randomization of polling personnel programme hman a ni. Final randomization programme-ah hian Election Officer bakah Municipal Returning Officer (MRO) leh Assistant Municipal Returning Officer (AMRO) te an tel.

AMC,2026 inthlanpuia polling personnel hman theih tura awm te hi PRO tan 330, PO-I tan 330 leh PO-II tan 329 an ni a. Heng atang hian 1st leh 2nd Randomization-ah Polling station 264-a duty tur PRO-264, PO-I-264 leh PO-II -264 leh, ward tin tan Reserve 20% nen computer chuan a thlangchhuak (randomized) tawh a. Polling Team 1 a awm tur PRO leh PO-I leh PO-II ( inkawp tur) te pawh thlanchhuah(randomized) tawh a ni a. Chung Polling team te chu Ward 19-ah a lo semdarh (randomized) tawh bawk a ni. Vawiin Final Randomization-ah hian Ward tin a Polling team te chu Ward tin chhunga an duty na tur Polling station theuhva computer hmanga semdarh( randomized) leh an ni.AMC hnuaiah hian Ward 19 awmin, heta tanga Ward 6(paruk) hi hmeichhe tana reserved a ni a, Local council 89 leh Polling Station 264 a awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: LUNGLEI DISTRICT HORTICULTURE DEPARTMENT HOTUTE'N THLENGANG RAM SIHPHIR ZAU LEH SIHMUAL ZAU TLAWHIN, DEPARTMENT HNUAIA KUT HNA THAWKTUTE HMA LAKNA AN ENPUI
CEM LADC LEH LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP TEN HRUITEZAWL TLAWH
content:
201/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 18th April 2026:Nimin khan Lai Autonomous District Council - a Chief Executive Member (CEM) Pu C. Lalsawmzuala leh Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga te chuan Hruitezawl an tlawh a, khawtlang hruaituten an lo dawngsawng a ni.

Pu C.Lalsawmzuala chuan khawtlang hruaituten an lo dawndawnaah lawmthu a sawi a. Chhimtuipui lui dunga Lawng chetvel dante, bungrua lut leh chhuakte chu Council sawrkarin awmzenei zawa kalpui a tum tih a sawi a. Thenawm ram Myanmar nena sumdawnna kal mekah inkhuahkhirhna tha leh mumal zawk kalpui chu thil pawimawh tak a ni tih tarlangin, ruahmanna felfai zawka siam a kalpui a ni ang a ti. Hruitezawl chu ramria awm an nih angin, kawng hrang hrangah fimkhur thiam a tul dawn hle tih sawiin, thahnem ngai taka ram leh hnam tana thawk turin a fuih a. Kawhtlang hruaitute leh sawrkar inkarah thawhhona tha tak a awm a tul hle tiin, CEM chuan thawhhona tha zawk awm turin thawhpuiah sawmin, mamawh an neihte ngaihsak a tum thu a sawi a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Hruitezawl chu Myanmar nen insumdawn tawnna hmun a nih angin, dan lova ramdangmi luhna remchang a zau hle tih sawiin, heng lakah hian khawtlang hruaitute chu fimkhur turin a chah a.Tun dinhmunah Hruitezawlah Raltlan In 300 vel awmte pawh sawrkarin a hriatpui tih sawiin, thlitlhai reng an ni a ti a. An khawsak leh chetvelna kawngah dan kalh a awm leh awmloh chik chu a pawiwh hle tih sawiin, hemi kawngah hian khawtlang hruaituten theihtawp lo chhuahpui turin a sawm a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan khawtlangin mamawh an neih kawng hrang hrangah tanpui a inhuam reng thu a tarlang bawk a ni.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala leh Pu Donny Lalruatsanga te hian Hruitezawl chhaka khualzin te tlawh hlawh tak ' 'Bawinu' chu a hmunah kalin an tlawh nghal a. Khuanun a duan hmun mawi leh ropui tak mai Lawngtlai District leh Siaha District- in a nei chu District pahnih tan vanneihna a ni tih tarlangin, heng hmunte hi a nihdan tidanglam lo va, a tlawhtuten awmlsam zawka an tlawh theih dan turte, a hmun hma chei that leh hahchawlhna remchang zawk siam kawngah hmalak a nih tur thu an sawi a ni.

Bawrhsap leh CEM te hi Pu David Lalrinawma, Additional DC, Pu David J. Byhnadaolai, Addl SP, Pu HC. Vanlalruatpuia, Transport Officer, LADC, Pu C. Lawmsangzuala, I&PRO, LADC bakah MJA Lawngtlai District hruaituten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: RUN FOR NUTRITION MARATHON BUATSAIH
content:
200/2026-2027

Aizawl,April ni 18, 2026:Tukin zing dar 6:00 khan MINECO Open Gym tualzawlah Women & Child Development leh A-City Run Club buatsaihin Poshan Pakhwada 2026 - ‘Run For Nutrition’ Marathon buatsaih a ni a. Mi 624 an tel a ni.

Marathon intihsiaknaa tel zawng zawng ten hrisel zawk na atan ei leh in tha leh thianghlim ngai pawimawh turin thu an tiam a. He thutiamna hi Pi Zoramthangi Chhangte, Director Women & Child Develoment chuan a kaihruai a. Chumi zawhah Pi Zonunthari Joint Secretary, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development in participant-te a vailiam a ni.

He marathon hi category 3-a intihsiak niin

WOMEN CATEGORY (Open), MEN CATEGORY (Open) LEH SUB JUNIOR CATEGORY-ah te intihsiak a ni:Result Women (Open):1. H. Ngohlaso2. Lalrinhlui3. Lalhmangaihzuali

Sub Junior :1. Ricky Tlangthangpuia2. Benjamin Vanlalpeka3. Lalsangzuala

Men (Open) :1. Lalnunmawia2. T Beimokha3. Lalkaisanga
